features.name: User can log in
features.description: Given a user with valid credentials (email: user@example.com, password: password123), when they navigate to /login and submit the form, they should be redirected to the dashboard and see a welcome message.

features.name: User can create a new item
features.description: Given a logged-in user on the dashboard, when they click 'New Item', fill in the name field, and submit, a new item should appear in the list with the correct name.
